allowed_current_claims.wording: An independent evidence-validation execution checkpoint has been recorded.
The Stage 3B formal evidence/BF lineage remains discussable internally with caveats.
The scoped posterior summary and descriptive DEU/native posterior comparison remain allowed with caveats.

blocked_claims.reason: Independent-validation execution has not yet passed a result gate and claim lock.
External/publication evidence language requires independent result gate plus publication claim lock.
Superiority requires independent validation result gate, sensitivity audit, and scoped claim lock.
TT_lite remains diagnostic-only and excluded from the sampled/evidence scope.
Final publication-style claims require a later final claim-lock stage.
